description: Paired C0-C3 20-percent-off coupon experiment at the 12-vehicle formal nine-zone candidate baseline.

coupon_experiment.interpretation: Finite daily 20-percent-off coupon scenario assumptions, not observed Shanghai take-up or welfare estimates.

scope_notes: All policies within a seed share Agents, activities, OD, weather, 12-vehicle pool, mode-choice shocks and base dispatch priorities.
A coupon binds to the first ride-hailing request; success redeems it and failure expires it for that modeled day-weather run.
C3 community/phone assistance enables one proxy booking only for an awarded elder-reserve coupon and does not change digital_access.
